title: Can't use MariaDB Database
author: phillipunzen
body_snippet: I have created a new database on my MariaDB Server and the mRemoteNG can't connect with this database. Have anyone a idea why? Thank you all!

iterations.description: MariaDB is a fundamentally different database engine from MS SQL Server (which is currently the only supported backend), making this a major feature request with no reproducible steps, no specification of expected behavior, and no response to the maintainer's retesting request on current builds.
MariaDB supported via existing MySQL connector (MySqlDatabaseConnector). User was likely using MSSQL dialog instead of MySQL.

comments.author: igor2x
comments.snippet: Above window is for Microsoft SQL Server database, it will not work on MariaDB, that is completely different database.

comments.author: Kvarkas
comments.snippet: Its not yet properly tested, but perhaps will be included to testing phase

comments.author: robertpopa22
comments.snippet:
**Update from fork `robertpopa22/mRemoteNG`**

MariaDB is MySQL-compatible and should work with our MySQL auto-schema upgrade. If you're still having issues, please try the latest **[CENSORED!] Links to external GitHub repositories are not allowed** from our fork.

Fix included in **[CENSORED!] Links to external GitHub repositories are not allowed**.

notes: MariaDB is MySQL-compatible. Our MySQL auto-schema upgrade should handle it. User may have been using MSSQL dialog for MySQL.
